meaning_english: A person who unexpectedly wins or succeeds.
To show signs of cowardice.
A decisive test of quality or truth.
To dance in a very energetic or impressive way.
To falsify financial records to steal money.
A day of celebration and festivities.
To waste energy on something that is already over or settled.

meaning_kannada: ಗಮನವನ್ನು ಬೇರೆಡೆಗೆ ಸೆಳೆಯುವ ವಿಷಯ (Gamana bereyadege seleyuvudu)
meaning_english: Something that misleads or distracts from a relevant or important issue.
To try to improve something that is already beautiful or perfect.

meaning_kannada: ಸರಿಯಾದ ಸಮಯಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಮೊದಲೇ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Modale kelasa maduvudu)
meaning_english: To do something before the right time.
An unattainable or fanciful hope or plan.
To take a subordinate or lesser role to someone else.
To take the attention or praise away from someone else.
A problem that is very difficult to solve.

meaning_kannada: ಎಲ್ಲಾ ರೀತಿಯ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Ella prayatna maduvudu)
meaning_english: To try every possible way to achieve something.
To give someone a strong warning to stop behaving badly.
An insult disguised as a compliment.
To fight imaginary enemies.
To do something completely or thoroughly.
A person with a weak character.
To prevent someone or something from approaching or causing problems.

meaning_kannada: ಮರಳಿ ಬರುವ ಹಾದಿಯನ್ನು ಮುಚ್ಚುವುದು (Sumbandhavannu todedu hakuvudu)
meaning_english: To destroy one's path back to a previous situation.
To lose one's job suddenly.
To wait patiently and take no action.
An unfriendly person who shows no emotion.

meaning_kannada: ಸೋಲನ್ನು ಅನುಭವಿಸುವುದು ಅಥವಾ ಸಾಯುವುದು (Solu athava marana)
meaning_english: To fail or to die.
To ponder or meditate on something.
To fail to remember something or get no response.
To waste time trying to do something that is impossible.
To ignore what someone is saying.
